title: Project Kaleidoscope: Contextual, Human-Aligned Evaluation for Real-World AI Applications

text.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

official_kaleidoscope_repository.relation_to_paper: The acquisition-time HEAD commit is about 19 hours after immutable arXiv v1 submission, so it is a post-v1 release and must not be treated as the exact paper-time implementation.
official_kaleidoscope_repository.archive_integrity: ZIP CRC verification passed for all members.

official_meta_evaluator_repository.relation_to_paper: The pinned v0.3.3 commit predates immutable arXiv v1 and is the acquisition-time linked release candidate; the deep reviewer must still verify which paper experiments, prompts, and records it implements.
official_meta_evaluator_repository.archive_integrity: ZIP CRC verification passed for all members.

official_rubricbench_dataset.relation_to_paper: The immutable paper cites this dataset as its 108-pair, two-annotator development set. The dataset revision predates arXiv v1, but the repositories do not contain the paper's experiment scripts or raw judge-result tables.
official_rubricbench_dataset.access_boundary: The repository is manually gated. An unauthenticated pinned-revision request for qa_custom_metrics_ann.csv returned HTTP 401 on 2026-07-18, so row-level annotations and paper result tables were not recomputed.

verification.pdfinfo_title: Project Kaleidoscope: Contextual, Human-Aligned Evaluation for Real-World AI Applications
verification.text_inspection: Non-empty extraction inspected from title and abstract through workflow, human annotation, rubric/jury, pilot, experiment tables, prompt-augmentation appendix, limitations, and the final page break. Tables and all 13 page boundaries are present with no UTF-8 replacement characters.
verification.source_archive_integrity: Archive listed successfully; 21 members include main.tex, bibliography, style files, workflow figures, screenshots, and pilot-form assets.
verification.repository_archive_inspection: Both complete ZIP archives passed CRC checks. During deep review, prompts, schemas, persistence, metrics, annotation, persona generation, documentation, and representative tests were inspected. A locked Python 3.13 slice covering metrics, persona sampling/generation, and system rubrics passed 37 tests with 1,195 warnings in 4.83 seconds. No Appendix B paper experiment could be executed because scripts, raw predictions, and the gated row dataset were unavailable.

review_boundary: This record establishes immutable-paper acquisition, full-text reading, timing-aware release inspection, official dataset-card preservation, and deterministic conformance for a 37-test implementation slice. It does not establish Appendix B reproduction, pilot validity, annotation quality, judge transport reliability, criterion support, contextual representativeness, exact release-paper equivalence, professional utility, production fitness, or readiness.
